## Meeting Purpose

[Explore collaboration opportunities between Marcel's AI-driven content creation company (fwd.digital) and Sam's professional community platform (Pavilion).](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) offers AI-powered content creation workflows, reaching $6M ARR in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Pavilion is running an "AI for Go-to-Market Mastery" program, seeking expert collaborators](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Both parties expressed strong interest in partnership, focusing on education and potential client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Personal connection established through shared experiences of parenthood and career challenges](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Growth

  - [Started with educational workshops, evolved into AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Built complex AI workflows for research, planning, and content execution](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Developed a system to orchestrate workflows as code, adaptable for various clients](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Offering includes strategist, managing editor, and full team delivering content outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Reached nearly $6M ARR in 6 months, with 30 clients including Reddit, Ramp, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

### Pavilion's AI for Go-to-Market Program

  - [Year-long program with four courses focused on AI in go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Seeking expert lecturers and collaborators for the program](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [AI for go-to-market sub-community is Pavilion's most active group](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Marcel open to various engagement levels: guest speaking, fireside chats, or more extensive involvement](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Possibility of Pavilion becoming a client of fwd.digital for content creation and repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Mutual interest in leveraging Marcel's expertise for Pavilion's educational initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Personal Connections

  - [Both expecting/new fathers: Sam expecting in 4 weeks, Marcel has a 21-month-old daughter](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Shared experiences of career challenges, including being fired by "stupid CEOs"](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to introduce Marcel to Josh Carter (Pavilion's head of demand gen) for potential client relationship](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Sam to connect Marcel with Tom Andrews, who's running Pavilion's AI and automation course](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more details on his availability and preferred format for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Explore piloting fwd.digital's content repurposing workflows with Pavilion's existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Follow up in a couple of weeks to solidify collaboration plans](https://fathom.video/share/ubdti6vDXuKBs6p6J9M2e_ee9ZZi2Exy?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
